task: Refactor nested if-else chains into match expression

solution.explanation: Replace nested if-else with match on ranges for cleaner pattern matching.

task: Refactor explicit loop accumulation into iterator chain

solution.explanation: Replace manual loop with iterator chain: filter even numbers, square them, sum.

task: Extract common error handling into a custom error type

solution.explanation: Extract string-based error handling into a proper error enum with From impls, enabling the ? operator to work cleanly.
solution.improvement: More code but better error handling, composability, and type safety

task: Replace cloned data with borrowed references to avoid allocations

solution.explanation: Take a borrowed slice instead of owned Vec. Return Option<&String> to avoid cloning. Use iterator for conciseness.

task: Refactor callback-based API to use effects

solution.explanation: Replace callback parameters with an effect declaration. The function becomes cleaner; logging/metrics implementation is decided by the handler at the call site.
solution.improvement: Decoupled logging from business logic, easier to test and compose

task: Refactor sequential operations into a pipeline

solution.explanation: Replace three separate loops with a single iterator pipeline. Eliminates intermediate Vec allocations and is more readable.

task: Refactor string concatenation into format strings

solution.explanation: Replace manual string concatenation with a single format string.

task: Refactor deeply nested Result handling into flat ? chains

solution.explanation: Replace nested match on Result with the ? operator. Requires From impls on AppError (see ref-003 pattern). Flat, readable, and idiomatic.
solution.improvement: 68% token reduction, requires From trait impls

task: Refactor Arc<Mutex<HashMap>> into concurrent-safe wrapper struct

solution.explanation: Encapsulate the Arc<Mutex<HashMap>> behind a struct with methods. Cleaner API, type-safe, and the Clone derive makes sharing trivial.
solution.improvement: Similar token count but much better API design and encapsulation

task: Refactor imperative config parsing into declarative builder

solution.explanation: Replace manual argument parsing with clap derive macros. Automatic help text, validation, and error handling.
